full_prompt: Design the primary roll cage (complete welded tubular space frame) for a student-built single-seat off-road recreational vehicle, compliant with a governing structural-demonstration tech sheet. Primary members (rear roll hoop, overhead member, lateral forward support) shall be 25.4 mm (1 in) OD x 3 mm (0.120 in) wall AISI 1018 DOM steel tubing. Secondary members may be 25.4 mm OD x 0.89 mm (0.035 in) wall. Driver is a 95th percentile male occupant per a standard driver template; minimum helmet clearance to cage surfaces 152 mm (6 in). Wheelbase 1500 mm typical; track 1200 mm. Material: AISI 1018 DOM, E = 200 GPa, yield = 370 MPa (DOM cold-drawn), ultimate = 440 MPa, density = 7850 kg/m^3. Vehicle total mass with driver 300 kg (car 220 kg + driver 80 kg). Load cases from the governing structural-demonstration tech sheet: (R1) Front-impact 4 g: 4 x 300 kg x 9.81 = 11,772 N applied to the front of the rear roll hoop in the longitudinal -X direction; max von Mises in any tube <= yield / 1.15 = 322 MPa. (R2) Side-impact 3 g: 3 x 300 kg x 9.81 = 8,829 N applied laterally at the rear roll hoop top; max von Mises <= 322 MPa. (R3) Rollover vertical 2 g: 2 x 300 kg x 9.81 = 5,886 N applied vertically downward at the overhead members; max von Mises <= 322 MPa. (R4) Rear-impact 3 g: 3 x 300 kg x 9.81 = 8,829 N applied to the rear of the cage in +X direction at bumper height; max von Mises <= 322 MPa. (R5) Combined load case: simultaneous front + rollover = LC1 + LC3; max von Mises <= ultimate / 1.5 = 293 MPa. (R6) Driver-envelope protection: no deflection under any case shall cause the cage surface to enter the driver template envelope (nominally no cage point moves more than 50 mm inward in cockpit cross-section). (R7) Cage mass <= 30 kg. Primary verification: structural FEA (linear static, 5 cases). Vibration, thermal, fluid, radiation, buckling NOT required. Deliverables: STEP AP242 welded frame, weld map, tube schedule, and a report listing cage mass in kg, max von Mises per load case in MPa, max cockpit-envelope intrusion in mm.
short_prompt:
Design the primary roll cage (welded tubular space frame) for a student-built single-seat off-road recreational vehicle, compliant with the governing structural-demonstration tech sheet. Primary members (rear roll hoop, overhead, lateral forward support) are 25.4 mm OD x 3 mm wall AISI 1018 DOM; secondary members may be 25.4 mm OD x 0.89 mm wall. Vehicle total mass with driver 300 kg (220 kg car + 80 kg driver).

Envelope: wheelbase 1500 mm, track 1200 mm, driver template is a 95th-percentile male with helmet clearance >= 152 mm (6 in) to all cage surfaces.

Load cases (inertial loads on 300 kg, applied at the rear roll hoop / bumper height per the tech sheet).
- LC1 front impact 4 g: 11,772 N in -X direction at the rear roll hoop.
- LC2 side impact 3 g: 8,829 N lateral at the rear roll hoop top.
- LC3 rollover vertical 2 g: 5,886 N vertical downward at the overhead members.
- LC4 rear impact 3 g: 8,829 N in +X direction at bumper height.
- LC5 combined front + rollover (LC1 + LC3 simultaneous).
- LC6 driver-envelope protection: no cage point moves more than 50 mm inward into the driver template under any case.

prompt.title: Student off-road vehicle primary roll cage
prompt.brief: 1018 DOM 1 in OD x 3 mm wall welded tubular cage. Five static load cases with 322 MPa limit + driver-envelope check.

boundary_conditions.loads: point or distributed at cage nodes
